# Maven

target/
pom.xml.tag
pom.xml.releaseBackup
pom.xml.versionsBackup
pom.xml.next
release.properties

# Eclipse

.project
.classpath
.settings/
.metadata/
.recommenders/

# Eclipse JDT

*.launch

# Eclipse build output

bin/

# IntelliJ (in case project opened there)

.idea/
*.iml

# VS Code

.vscode/

# OS generated files

.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Logs

*.log

# Temporary files

*.tmp
*.swp

# Dependency directories

node_modules/

# Flink checkpoints (optional if using local checkpoints)

checkpoints/
savepoints/
